subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Parsons home in Washington, 1912-05-09
subcodes.first_line: Although I pay great respect to the feelings of people in order that they may not run away or make the least objection, yet the religious ministers of Washington have denounced us
subcodes.first_line_orig: من خیلی رعایت نفوس میکنم که فرار ننمایند و ادنی اعتراضی نتوانند با وجود این
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
